stages.title: Program setup
stages.action: Create the program shell, section order, module catalog, and source-material manifest.

stages.title: Content ingestion
stages.action: Enter source-material metadata, create lesson shells, map references, and attach downloadable resource placeholders.

stages.title: Faculty authoring
stages.action: Populate lesson objectives, key takeaways, red flags, evidence tiers, and case prompts.

stages.title: Assessment build
stages.action: Create MCQs, image interpretation items, short answers, and case reasoning tasks with pass marks and retry rules.

stages.title: Academic review
stages.action: Review scientific accuracy, clinical tone, evidence integrity, and alignment with the academic blueprint.

stages.title: Governance sign-off
stages.action: Approve publication readiness, certificate rules, and faculty review requirements.

stages.title: Publish
stages.action: Publish the approved version into the doctor portal and lock the released curriculum version.

stages.title: Post-publication maintenance
stages.action: Issue corrections, create new version drafts, and preserve learner records against the published release.
